name: Cosine-ProtoNet
strengths: Standard non-gradient personalization; official ORBIT implementation
limitations: Framewise unless paired temporal wrapper is added

name: ProtoNet-LITE
paper_title: Memory Efficient Meta-Learning with Large Images
limitations: Different backbone/training cannot be mixed into paired significance tests

name: Adaptive-ProtoNet
paper_title: Improving ProtoNet for Few-Shot Video Object Recognition
limitations: Published number predates later official backbone table

name: LN-Tune
paper_title: Strong Baselines for Parameter-Efficient Few-Shot Fine-Tuning
limitations: More mutable parameters and adaptation compute

name: FiT
paper_title: FiT: Parameter Efficient Few-shot Transfer Learning
limitations: Exact ORBIT video protocol requires additional adaptation

name: Fixed-Temporal-EMA
strengths: Tests whether temporal smoothing alone suffices

name: GRU-BPTT
strengths: BPTT baseline only; not a local learner

name: Fixed-Best-Motif
strengths: Primary causal comparator with identical actuator library

name: Reward-Selector-Shuffled
strengths: Breaks action-credit specificity with matched observations and updates
limitations: Negative control rather than competitive method

name: Oracle-Per-Frame
limitations: Uses query label and is never deployable

name: Gated-Delta-Memory
limitations: Not an official ORBIT model; must use same frozen features
